dry_run_payload.texture_prompt: Strict low-poly game-ready M4A3 Sherman hull envelope only, target around 1500 generated polygons, simple clean authored armor planes, sloped glacis, rear deck, side sponson mass, turret ring opening, welded seams via texture/normal map not dense geometry, matte olive drab PBR painted steel. Generate lowpoly directly; do not make a detailed high-poly mesh; no decimation artifacts; no faceted pillow shape; no turret, barrel, wheels, tracks, or text.
